query: SELECT id, userId, fullness, energy, mood, lastDecayAt, lastFedAt, createdAt, updatedAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, lastDecayAt, NOW()) as minutesSinceLastDecay FROM monsterCaring;
